title: Immediate Requirement Software Engineer at Schneider Electric India

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Software Engineer at Schneider Electric India
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Schneider Electric India. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Software Engineer to strengthen our Tiruchirappalli-based team.

About Schneider Electric India:
Schneider Electric India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Machine Learning

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Professional development and training programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Schneider Electric India!
